title: Creep

earnings.assumptions: Estimate infers current annual earnings from streaming scale, catalog replay value, and sync utility, using typical rights splits across masters, publishing, and writers.

ownership.master_owner: Usually split between label-controlled masters and artist royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing is typically shared across writers, producers, and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is confirmed in this estimate
ownership.notes: This is an inferred gross-to-net range based on current streaming and catalog behavior, not a public royalty statement.

meaning_summary: This song holds value through a recognizable core riff or chorus, strong emotional payoff, and steady replay.
revenue_drivers: Classic replay value and catalog streaming keep major rock songs relevant.
Cultural familiarity supports long-tail listener demand.
Sync placements and live-culture recognition help extend the song's revenue life.
